reviews.review_title: This is a very good game
reviews.review_description: This is a very good game, but it is very easy to get banned because they’re normally our admin on quite a lot and most lobbies have very toxic people and if you report them, then you could get in a lot of trouble, but the most of the population of this game are very nice people and the only reason why there are toxic people in the game is because all the people from gorilla tag who got banned are in this game and sometimes it can ban you for no reason, but they try and warn if they can

Dude, I just like this game, but no, it's not better than gorilla tag. It's the second most gorilla tag
